about.title: About Me
about.description: Aspiring Cybersecurity Engineer specializing in SOC & Detection Engineering. Currently a PFE intern @ BLUESEC, focusing on detection automation via the MITRE ATT&CK framework and Breach and Att&ck Simulation technologies. My goal: enhancing infrastructure resilience through intelligent log correlation and continuous monitoring.

tasks: Automated Breach and Attack Simulation (BAS) based on OpenAEV and Caldera.
Implemented Detection Engineering: created Kibana detection rules aligned with the MITRE ATT&CK framework.
Developed a Python correlation engine to automatically link attack simulations to SIEM alerts.
Deployed advanced telemetry via Sysmon and Winlogbeat for detecting malicious behaviors (Encoded PowerShell, WMI, etc.).
Created custom SOC Dashboards in Kibana for real-time visualization of detection and prevention KPIs.
jobs.technologies: OpenAEV, Caldera, Elastic Stack (ELK), Python, Docker, MITRE ATT&CK, Sysmon, EDR.

tasks: Monitored Linux servers and analyzed system logs to detect anomalies and incidents.
Implemented secure backups and encryption for sensitive data.
Automated security tasks via Bash scripts.
jobs.technologies: Restic, Rclone, Cloud, Data Security, Linux.

jobs.company: Chamber of Commerce, Industry and Services
tasks: Designed and secured a multi-site MPLS network.
Configured VLANs, routing, segmentation, and access control.

jobs.company: Wilaya and Prefecture of Agadir Ida-Outanane
tasks: Managed user access and network security.

items.title: 5G Zero Trust Architecture
items.description: The evolution towards 5G Standalone brings unprecedented performance but significantly widens the attack surface of telecom infrastructures. This project focuses on designing a multi-layer security architecture based on Zero Trust principles to protect the critical components of the 5G core network.

items.title: Log Supervision and Intrusion Detection with Wazuh and Elasticsearch
items.description: Designed a centralized Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) system. Used Wazuh for intrusion detection and the ELK Stack for event correlation. Integrated Suricata and VirusTotal to enrich telemetry and automate malware detection.

items.title: Computer Network Monitoring
items.description: Implemented an open-source monitoring solution on Linux for managing complex IT environments. The goal was to ensure service continuity via a real-time alerting system (SMS, Email) to reduce downtime and optimize network maintenance.

items.title: Web Server Security Assessment via Nessus
items.description: In-depth vulnerability analysis of a web server using Nessus. Identified potential security flaws, assessed associated risks, and developed technical recommendations to strengthen the infrastructure's resilience.
